videos.headline: Maryland LB catches his first career TD
videos.description: Taulia Tagovailoa tosses a short touchdown to Maryland linebacker Sean Greeley for the first score of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Maryland LB catches his first career TD) 2023/09/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Michigan State throws costly INT in red zone
videos.description: Michigan State's Katin Houser throws an interception to Maryland's Tarheeb Still to derail the Spartans' drive.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Michigan State throws costly INT in red zone) 2023/09/23 ESHEET
